description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows (Qt 5, x86) that can be triggered manually. Run a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository, caches and installs Qt 5.15.2 for win32_msvc2019, configures CMake with Visual Studio 16 2019 and Win32 architecture, builds the project in Release mode, packages it with windeployqt, and uploads the resulting artifact.
